# Rebuild Plan: BTN-004 — Button Loading State Visually Hidden Label

**Generated by:** change-impact-analyst
**Date:** 2026-05-01
**Trigger:** Rule BTN-004 drafted from accepted feedback `fb-2026-05-01-btn-spinner-aria-label`
**Graph run:** 2026-05-01 (37 files, 83 rule edges)

---

## Rule summary

**BTN-004:** When `loading=true`, Button must include a visually hidden "Loading…" text node inside the `<button>` element alongside the spinner. `aria-busy="true"` is retained. The visually hidden node must use the clip-path `.sr-only` pattern (not `display:none`).

---

## Affected artifacts

### Must update

| Artifact | File | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| Button implementation | `ui-lab/primitives/button/Button.tsx` | Add visually hidden loading label; add `.sr-only` utility |
| Button styles | `ui-lab/primitives/button/Button.css` | Add `.sr-only` utility class |
| Button retrieval manifest | `design-system/retrieval/manifests/button.manifest.md` | Add BTN-004 to Rules section |

### Should update

| Artifact | File | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| Button stories | `ui-lab/primitives/button/Button.stories.tsx` | Loading stories should include screen-reader audit note; no functional story change required |
| Button golden example | `design-system/golden-examples/single-components/button/v1.0.0/Button.tsx` | Snapshot is v1.0.0; a new snapshot will be needed once BTN-004 is promoted to active and gates pass |
| Button accessibility canonical | `design-system/canonical/accessibility/button.md` | Add BTN-004 gate check row for visually hidden loading label |

### Downstream rebuild order

1. `component-builder`: update `ui-lab/primitives/button/` to implement BTN-004
2. Re-run Token Gate (no token changes expected — pass)
3. Re-run State Gate (loading story unchanged — pass)
4. Re-run Accessibility Gate (new check: BTN-004 visually hidden label — must pass)
5. Re-run dependency tracker to confirm BTN-004 now cited in Button.tsx
6. Capture Chromatic baseline for updated Loading stories (`.sr-only` node is visually invisible; diff should be near-zero)
7. Guardian re-approval of updated Button
8. New golden example snapshot at `design-system/golden-examples/single-components/button/v1.0.0/` (updated in-place while still v1.0.0 since BTN-004 is not yet active)

---

## Gate re-run checklist

- [ ] Token Gate
- [ ] State Gate
- [ ] Accessibility Gate (must verify `.sr-only` + "Loading…" present when `loading=true`)
- [ ] Dependency Truth Gate (BTN-004 must appear in component-import-graph and canonical-spec-graph)
- [ ] Visual Regression Gate (Chromatic baseline capture)
- [ ] Guardian Approval Gate

---

## Notes

- BTN-004 status is currently **draft**. Guardian must promote to **active** before gates formally enforce it.
- The `.sr-only` utility class should be co-located in `Button.css` for now; if additional primitives need it, extract to a shared `ui-lab/primitives/utilities.css`.
- Migration file: not required (non-breaking addition).
